development_rule: Select position/layer and a linear decoder using discovery laws only. Evaluate once on the eight internal replication laws.
guardrails: The law marker precedes every numerical case.
The decision marker precedes the answer words.
The same generic algorithm is used for every direct and inverse law.
No generated chain of thought or intermediate label is supplied.
All outputs are retained, including failures.
interpretation_limit: All laws appeared in earlier studies. This run is method development, not a confirmatory result. A successful method must be frozen and rerun on entirely fresh laws.
purpose: Test whether an invariant, answer-free two-stage instruction elicits relation-sign, numerical-sign, and composed physical-sign variables that generalize across constitutive laws.
